merge_dependabot.description: Review and merge open Dependabot PRs

create_release.description: Create GitHub Release with tag + changelog

add_tests.description: Add test suites for untested modules

notes: Run 3092-3093: create_release on VoronoiMap (v1.43.1 — XSS security patch release). perf_improvement on prompt (PromptHeatmap instruction keyword scoring — replaced O(K×N) substring scan with O(W) HashSet lookup for single-word keywords, ~8× fewer substring searches per segment).
previousNotes: Run 3090-3091: refactor on agentlens (consolidated percentile into _utils.py — eliminated duplicate implementations in alerts.py and cli_common.py). perf_improvement on BioBots (replaced JSON.parse(JSON.stringify) with targeted shallow copies in mediaPrep.scale() — eliminated 2 full serialize/parse round-trips per call).
previousPreviousNotes: Run 3088-3089: perf_improvement on Vidly (single-pass ForecastDemand — replaced 4 LINQ passes with one for-loop for min/max/dayOfWeek/recent30). create_release on Vidly (v2.14.0 — Forecast Performance & Code Quality).
previousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 3086-3087: create_release on Vidly (v2.13.0 — Movie Taste DNA with 8-dimension preference analysis, archetype classification, radar chart). add_docstrings on everything (comprehensive docstrings for GameOfLifeService and AgeCalculatorService — 69 new doc-comment lines).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 3084-3085: add_codeql on gif-captcha (added dependency-review.yml for supply chain security + hardcoded secret scanning step in codeql.yml — detects AWS keys, OpenAI/Stripe secrets, GitHub PATs, Slack tokens, Google API keys, SendGrid keys). readme_overhaul on ai (added Table of Contents, Who Is This For? audience table, Key Concepts section explaining 5 core abstractions).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousPrevious: Run 3082-3083: refactor on agenticchat (deduplicated style injection across 9 modules — migrated manual styleInjected boolean + createElement pattern to shared _injectCSS helper, -49 lines boilerplate). security_fix on VoronoiMap (XSS fix — escaped user-supplied title strings in 5 SVG/HTML-generating modules: vormap_cartogram, vormap_spiral, vormap_variogram, vormap_label, vormap_text).

Run 3080-3081: perf_improvement on GraphVisual (pre-built adjSets map in GraphAnomalyDetector — eliminates O(V) JUNG getNeighbors() allocations in triangle counting, removes per-vertex ArrayList+HashSet in clustering coeff). create_release on GraphVisual (v2.57.0 — What-If Analyzer, Influence Maximizer, anomaly detection perf).

Run 3064-3065: security_fix on sauravcode (sandboxed API-served functions — disabled env_list/env_get/file I/O/HTTP builtins in sauravapi.py per-request interpreter copies to prevent secret exfiltration and SSRF). create_release on agenticchat (v2.35.0 — Smart Deadline Tracker with autonomous deadline detection + countdown dashboard, O(n) rate limiter fix).

Run 3060-3061: perf_improvement on ai (pre-computed cat_counts/resources once in BehaviorProfiler._analyze_agent — eliminated 4 redundant O(N) passes across 4 check methods). create_release on prompt (v5.12.0 — PromptContextAllocator, ReDoS hardening, regex pre-compilation, Truncate dedup).

Run 3056-3057: perf_improvement on FeedReader (cached normalizedURL + deduplicated uniqued() in ArticleDeduplicator.scan). create_release on sauravcode (v7.0.0 — 9 new tools, 5 security fixes, 8 perf improvements, 6 refactors). merge_dependabot re-rolled to create_release (no Dependabot PRs open anywhere).
